# 🤖 Berta Chapters — Learn AI From Zero to Mastery

**Free, open-source, interactive AI education.** Every chapter is generated by [Berta AI](https://berta.one), executable on your machine, and yours to fork and modify. No paywall. No signup. Just learning.

## Why Berta Chapters?

The best way to learn AI is by **doing**—writing code, running notebooks, and building real intuition. Berta Chapters gives you:

| What you get | Why it matters |
|--------------|-----------------|
| **Structured curriculum** | Python → ML → Deep Learning → LLMs in a clear order |
| **Executable chapters** | Jupyter notebooks, scripts, and exercises in every chapter |
| **Learning paths** | Choose "AI Engineer," "ML Specialist," "LLM Expert," or "Quick Start" |
| **Community-driven topics** | Request any AI chapter; Berta generates it for you |
| **100% open** | Clone, fork, remix—everything lives on GitHub |

Whether you're switching careers into AI, levelling up as a developer, or exploring LLMs and RAG, there's a path that fits.

---

## 🎯 Two Ways to Learn

### 1. The Curriculum Path — Guided Progression

A full journey from basics to advanced AI:

- **Foundation (Ch 1–5)** — Python, data structures, linear algebra, probability, software design  
- **Practitioner (Ch 6–15)** — ML intro, supervised learning, deep learning, NLP, RAG, MLOps  
- **Advanced (Ch 16–25+)** — Multi-agent systems, reinforcement learning, production AI, ethics  

**9 chapters available now** (76 hours of content). More unlock as the community grows.

### 2. Community-Requested Chapters — Learn What You Need

Need a chapter on **RAG**, **fine-tuning**, or **AI for finance**? Open a [Chapter Request issue](https://github.com/luigipascal/berta-chapters/issues/new?template=chapter-request.md). Describe your topic, level, and focus—Berta generates a full chapter. Free, no paywall.

---

## 🛤️ Pick Your Learning Path

Sorted by total time (shortest first):

| Path | Time | Who it's for | Chapters |
|------|------|----------------|----------|
| **Quick Start** | ~48h | Fast intro to AI | 1→5→6→9→11→23 |
| **AI for Finance** | ~85h | Finance professionals | 1→3→4→6→7→21→19→20→23 |
| **LLM & NLP Expert** | ~90h | Language models, RAG, prompting | 1→5→10→11→12→13→14→17→20→23 |
| **ML Specialist** | ~100h | ML theory and production | 1→2→3→4→6→7→8→9→15→19→20 |
| **AI Engineer** | ~110h | Full-stack AI apps | 1→2→3→4→5→6→9→11→13→15→20 |

---

## 🚀 Get Started in 5 Minutes

```bash
git clone https://github.com/luigipascal/berta-chapters.git
cd berta-chapters
pip install -r requirements.txt
python interactive/berta.py
```

The **interactive hub** lets you:

- Choose a learning path
- Take a short skill assessment
- Track progress and hours
- Run knowledge quizzes
- Browse every chapter

Then open your first notebook:

```bash
cd chapters/chapter-01-python-fundamentals
jupyter notebook notebooks/01_introduction.ipynb
```

---

## 📚 What’s Inside Each Chapter?

Every chapter follows the same structure:

- **README.md** — Objectives, prerequisites, time estimate  
- **Notebooks** — Intro → Intermediate → Advanced  
- **Scripts** — Production-style Python you can reuse  
- **Exercises** — With solutions  
- **Diagrams** — Mermaid and SVG  
- **Datasets** — Sample data for practice  
- **requirements.txt** — Dependencies  

Same format everywhere. Learn once, then move fast.

---

## 📊 What’s Available Right Now?

| Track | Chapters | Status |
|-------|----------|--------|
| **Foundation** | 1–5 (Python, Data Structures, Linear Algebra, Probability, Software Design) | ✅ All available |
| **Practitioner** | 6–7 (Intro to ML, Supervised Learning) | ✅ Available |
| **Practitioner** | 8–15 (Unsupervised, Deep Learning, NLP, LLMs, RAG, MLOps…) | 🔄 Coming soon |
| **Advanced** | 16–25+ | 📋 Planned |
| **Community** | Your requests | 🚀 Unlimited |

**27 notebooks**, **47 exercises with solutions**, **8 datasets**, **27 diagrams**. All open and ready to run.

---

## 💬 Request a Chapter

Want a chapter that doesn’t exist yet?

1. Go to [New Chapter Request](https://github.com/luigipascal/berta-chapters/issues/new?template=chapter-request.md).  
2. Describe the topic, your level, and what you want to focus on.  
3. Berta generates a full chapter and links it in the issue.

No paywall. No signup. Free forever.

---

## 📬 Stay Updated

- **Newsletter** — [Subscribe](https://chapters.berta.one/newsletter/) for new chapter alerts (at most one email per week).  
- **GitHub** — [Star](https://github.com/luigipascal/berta-chapters) or [Watch](https://github.com/luigipascal/berta-chapters/subscription) the repo.  
- **Discussions** — [Join the community](https://github.com/luigipascal/berta-chapters/discussions).

New chapters are released regularly; reaching **10 newsletter subscribers** unlocks weekly releases.
